name: Midland States Bancorp Inc. Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/40th Interest in a Share of 7.750% Fixed-Rate Reset Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series A
summary: Midland States Bancorp, Inc. is a community bank holding company, providing a full range of commercial and retail banking services, as well as wealth management, trust and insurance services. Headquartered in Effingham, Illinois, it operates primarily in Illinois and Indiana. Its depositary shares represent an interest in its preferred stock.
